compiled_state.title: Implement orphan-marker self-heal in reduce_all_tickets()
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Modify plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py reduce_all_tickets() to validate the .archived marker. When marker is present AND no *-ARCHIVED.json event file exists in the ticket dir (orphan), call remove_marker() from ticket_reducer.marker to remove it and fall back to slow path (call reduce_ticket() normally). When marker is present AND at least one *-ARCHIVED.json exists: fast-skip as normal (S1a behavior preserved). Implementation: after the existing stat() check for .archived, add glob for '{ticket_dir}/*-ARCHIVED.json' before fast-skip; if no match, remove orphan marker and continue to slow path. testing_mode: GREEN (ac8e-ff24 covers behavior).
